a.xlink:title: Computes the projections and interpolation relations.
Returns true, if the mapping has been computed.
Uses projection and interpolation relations to map data values.
Method used by partition. Tags vertices that could be owned by this rank.
Method used by partition. Tags vertices that can be filtered out.
Returns the constraint (consistent/conservative) of the mapping.
Get n number of closest edges to the given vertex.
Generates the InterpolationElements for directly projecting a Vertex on another Vertex.
Get n number of closest vertices to the given vertex.
Get n number of closest triangles to the given vertex.
Compares two Eigen::MatrixBase for equality up to tolerance.
